query:
-- Subject id lookup
SELECT id, slug FROM subjects WHERE slug IN ('math','science','ela','social','other');

-- Insert Tue May 26 plan
INSERT INTO daily_plans (date, day_type, status, notes)
VALUES ('2026-05-26', 'half', 'planned', 'First real summer-mode school day — light, anchored. Mom + Grandma run.');

SET @plan_may26 := LAST_INSERT_ID();

-- Tue May 26 blocks
INSERT INTO schedule_blocks (plan_id, sort_order, title, block_type, subject_id, duration_minutes, description) VALUES
(@plan_may26, 0, 'Slow morning',                'morning_warmup', NULL, 20, 'Tea, hello, parakeets, ducks. Summer pace — no rush.'),
(@plan_may26, 1, 'Math — Spectrum Math Gr 5',   'math',           (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='math'), 20, 'One short page or two. Light. Not the focus today.'),
(@plan_may26, 2, 'Outdoor / nature',             'adventure',      (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='science'), 35, 'Walk the yard, run check on the surviving 3 ducks, notice what is growing.'),
(@plan_may26, 3, 'Reading — your pick',          'read_aloud',     (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='ela'), 25, 'Tuck Everlasting OR Michael''s World OR something off the bookshelf. Your call.'),
(@plan_may26, 4, 'Choice block',                 'choice',         NULL, 30, 'Whatever you want. Art, makeup, parakeets, drawing, music.'),
(@plan_may26, 5, 'Cozy wrap-up',                 'catch_up',       NULL, 10, 'What stuck with you today? Or just done.');

-- Insert Thu May 28 plan
INSERT INTO daily_plans (date, day_type, status, notes)
VALUES ('2026-05-28', 'full', 'planned', 'Second summer-mode day. Slightly more structure than Tue. Includes placement page intro.');

SET @plan_may28 := LAST_INSERT_ID();

-- Thu May 28 blocks
INSERT INTO schedule_blocks (plan_id, sort_order, title, block_type, subject_id, duration_minutes, description) VALUES
(@plan_may28, 0, 'Slow morning',                          'morning_warmup', NULL, 20, 'Slow start. Summer pace.'),
(@plan_may28, 1, 'Try one thing on the placement page',   'custom',         (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='ela'), 20, 'Try a few questions. Skip is a real button. We are just seeing what feels easy and what feels hard.'),
(@plan_may28, 2, 'Duck care + nature',                    'adventure',      (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='science'), 35, 'Sit with the ducks, water, run check, notice the yard.'),
(@plan_may28, 3, 'Spectrum Science Gr 5',                 'adventure',      (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='science'), 25, 'One short lesson plus the matching reading.'),
(@plan_may28, 4, 'Choice block',                          'choice',         NULL, 30, 'Whatever you want.'),
(@plan_may28, 5, '180 Days of Language Gr 5',             'custom',         (SELECT id FROM subjects WHERE slug='ela'), 15, 'One page. That is it.'),
(@plan_may28, 6, 'Cozy wrap-up',                          'catch_up',       NULL, 10, 'Optional. Or just done.');

-- Verify
SELECT dp.id, dp.date, dp.day_type, dp.status, COUNT(sb.id) AS blocks, SUM(sb.duration_minutes) AS total_min
FROM daily_plans dp
LEFT JOIN schedule_blocks sb ON sb.plan_id = dp.id
WHERE dp.date IN ('2026-05-26','2026-05-28')
GROUP BY dp.id, dp.date, dp.day_type, dp.status
ORDER BY dp.date;
